ValidationRule.description: Blocks users from moving a prospect application forward on the path until the scholarship invite has been sent and confirmed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Application_Status__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Invite Sent")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Rejected")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Withdrawn")), OR( NOT(Scholarship_Invite_Sent__c), NOT(Scholarship_Invite_Confirmed__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Scholarship_Invite_Status__c, "Confirmed")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The scholarship invite must be sent and confirmed before this application can move forward to document collection or review.
